title: The Curious Formula
description: A partial encyclopedia article lists three ingredients on the same aspect. Use the supporting clues to identify the fourth.

hints.text: The article on the R aspect has three known entries: ingredients [2, 4, 8] all have R+. There are exactly 4 alchemicals with R+. The fourth must be one of: [1, 3, 5, 6, 7]. Use the other clues to eliminate candidates.

Eliminate candidates:
  — ingredient 1: survives
  — ingredient 3: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 5: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 6: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
  — ingredient 7: eliminated (eliminated by constraints)
Only ingredient 1 remains. It is alchemical pNn, which has R+. It is the missing fourth entry.
